tmux_fresh_launch.description: Fresh tmux launch — single pane with shell, green status bar

tmux_type_in_shell.description: Tmux pane after running echo hello

tmux_vsplit.description: Vertical split — two panes side by side with border

tmux_vsplit_type_both.description: Vertical split with typed text in both panes

tmux_hsplit.description: Horizontal split — two panes stacked with border

tmux_hsplit_type_both.description: Horizontal split with typed text in both panes

tmux_three_panes.description: Three panes: vsplit then hsplit the right pane

tmux_navigate_left.description: Vsplit then navigate to left pane — border colors change

tmux_navigate_cycle_o.description: Cycle panes with Ctrl-B o twice

tmux_status_bar_renamed.description: Status bar after renaming a window

tmux_command_prompt_typed.description: Command prompt with some text typed

tmux_copy_mode.description: Copy mode indicator on status bar

tmux_vim_launch.description: Vim launched inside a tmux pane (new file)

tmux_vim_with_content.description: Vim with existing file content inside tmux

tmux_vim_insert_and_quit.description: Vim: enter insert, type text, :wq — back to shell prompt

tmux_vim_and_shell_split.description: Vim in left pane, shell in right pane

tmux_exit_one_vsplit_pane.description: Exit right pane in vsplit — left pane fills space

tmux_exit_last_pane_detaches.description: Exit the last pane — tmux session ends, back to outer shell

tmux_vsplit_active_right.description: Vsplit with right pane active — check border colors

tmux_vsplit_active_left.description: Vsplit with left pane active — check border colors

tmux_detach_shell.description: Detach from tmux — back to outer shell

tmux_reattach.description: Detach and reattach — tmux state preserved

tmux_exit_and_relaunch.description: Exit tmux (last pane), then launch tmux again — second session must be fully functional

int_vim_dd_p.description: Vim: dd (delete line) then p (paste below)

int_vim_write_cat.description: Vim: write file then cat it — VFS round-trip

int_vim_reopen.description: Vim: write, quit, reopen — content persisted in VFS

int_vim_quit_nosave_reopen.description: Vim: edit, :q! (no save), reopen — original content preserved

int_vim_edit_save_edit_save.description: Vim: two edit-save cycles on same file

int_vim_open_echoed_file.description: Shell echo > file, then vim it — VFS bridging

int_vim_open_below.description: Vim: o to open line below and type

int_vim_open_above.description: Vim: O to open line above and type

int_vim_yy_p.description: Vim: yy (yank line) then p (paste below)

int_vim_undo.description: Vim: dd then u (undo) — restore deleted line

int_vim_x_delete_chars.description: Vim: x to delete characters at cursor

int_vim_w_motion.description: Vim: w (word forward) then i (insert at new position)

int_vim_G_gg.description: Vim: G (go to end) then gg (go to top)

int_vsplit_vim_left.description: Vsplit: vim in left pane, shell prompt in right

int_vsplit_vim_both.description: Vsplit: vim in both panes (different files)

int_hsplit_vim_bottom.description: Hsplit: shell on top, vim on bottom

int_split_exit_vim.description: Vsplit: vim in right pane, :q, back to shell in that pane

int_split_vim_echo.description: Vsplit: vim left, echo output right — mixed content

int_three_panes_vim_center.description: Three vertical panes: shell | vim | shell

int_navigate_type_navigate.description: Vsplit: type right, navigate left, type, navigate back — right content preserved

int_hsplit_navigate_up.description: Hsplit: type bottom, navigate up — top pane active

int_last_pane_semicolon.description: Vsplit: navigate using ; (last active pane toggle)

int_two_windows_echo.description: Two windows: echo in each, verify window 1 visible

int_window_switch_back.description: Two windows: switch back to window 0, content preserved

int_three_windows.description: Three windows: status bar shows all three

int_window_select_number.description: Three windows: select window 0 by number

int_window_last_active.description: Toggle last window with Ctrl-B l

int_window_rename_verify.description: Rename window and verify status bar

int_window_tree_single.description: Ctrl-B w with 1 window: tree with session + 1 window

int_window_tree_three.description: Ctrl-B w with 3 windows: full tree visible

int_window_tree_navigate_down.description: Ctrl-B w with 3 windows, arrow down moves highlight

int_window_tree_select.description: Ctrl-B w: navigate to window 2 and Enter to switch

int_window_tree_escape.description: Ctrl-B w: Escape closes tree without switching

int_window_tree_q_close.description: Ctrl-B w: q closes tree without switching

int_detach_vim_reattach.description: Open vim, detach, reattach — vim still open

int_detach_split_reattach.description: Split, type both, detach, reattach — split preserved

int_exit_relaunch_vim.description: Exit tmux, relaunch, open vim — vim works after relaunch

int_double_relaunch.description: Exit, relaunch, exit, relaunch again — third session works

int_zoom_vim.description: Vsplit, zoom right pane with vim — full width

int_zoom_unzoom.description: Vsplit, zoom, unzoom — both panes visible again

int_vim_save_split_cat.description: Vim: write file, split, cat in other pane — content matches

int_navigate_vim_shell.description: Vsplit: vim left, navigate right echo, navigate back — vim preserved

int_window_with_splits.description: Window 0 has split, create window 1, switch back — split preserved

int_vim_quit_types_ZZ.description: Vim: ZZ to save and quit

int_vim_quit_types_ZQ.description: Vim: ZQ to quit without saving

int_copy_mode_navigate.description: Enter copy mode, navigate with hjkl

int_split_command_mode.description: Use Ctrl-B : split-window to create a split

int_echo_redirect_cat.description: Shell: echo > file, echo >> file, cat — file I/O

int_touch_vim_new.description: Touch file, then vim it — opens empty file

int_vim_e_switch_file.description: Vim: :e to switch from one file to another

int_vim_multiline_edit.description: Vim: multi-line insert with Enter in insert mode

int_vim_visual_delete.description: Vim: visual mode select and delete

int_vim_visual_line_delete.description: Vim: visual line mode select and delete

int_exit_vim_exit_tmux.description: Vim :q then exit tmux — back at outer shell

int_split_exit_both.description: Vsplit: exit right pane, then exit remaining left — tmux exits

int_shell_echo_multiple.description: Shell: multiple echo commands — output stacks

int_shell_clear_type.description: Shell: type, clear, type again — only new output visible
